An '''Imperial [[Prison ship/Legends|prison barge]]''' was a large [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for transferring prisoners to and from [[Planet/Legends|planets]].

==Characteristics==
It could safely hold upwards of 100,000 people, and was manned by a crew routinely consisting of corrections officers, torturers, and other various staff.<ref name="Payback" />

==History==
[[Dak Ralter/Legends|Dak Ralter]] and [[Breg]] used a stolen prison barge to escape from the [[Kalist Base|labor colony]] on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]] shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. With assistance from a mortally wounded Breg, Ralter managed to single-handedly [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] off of Kalist VI, enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and reach sanctuary at the [[Tierfon Rebel Outpost|Rebel base]] on the planet [[Tierfon/Legends|Tierfon]], where he miraculously landed the vessel.<ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>

The barges were often used to ferry suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizers to penal colonies during the reign of the Empire. One such vessel was the [[Purge (prison barge)|''Purge'']], which broke down in deep space and subsequently was contaminated with a deadly virus from a [[Vector (Star Destroyer)|derelict Star Destroyer]].<ref name="DT">''[[Death Troopers]]''</ref> They were also known to transport prisoners to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], [[Quirt's prison ship]] was one such ship that transported prisoners to Kessel.<ref name="WoW">{{StoryCite|story=Way of the Wookiee!|book=Star Wars Weekly 94}}</ref>

A number of these ships were docked at [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] fought in [[The Big Game]]. Those who were unable to pay their debts at the station's casinos could choose to go to the prison ships or fight in the Big Game.<ref name="SW19">[[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]]</ref>

Shortly after the [[Occupation of Bespin|Subjugation of Bespin]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] and [[Manaroo/Legends|Manaroo]], with assistance from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], used a stolen prison barge while masquerading as [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] officers to evacuate thousands of [[Aruzan/Legends|Aruzans]] from the planet [[Aruza/Legends|Aruza]], saving them from COMPNOR's [[Redesign]] policies.<ref name="Payback" />
